---
title: "Assignments"
description: "List of assignments for the GEOG 279 course."
---

**Note:** Click the link below to open the Google Colab notebook for different weeks. After opening the notebook in Google Colab, Go to "`File > Save a copy in Drive`", respond to questions in **your copy**, then email the notebook link to [baylis@ucsb.edu](mailto:baylis@ucsb.edu) with the subject: "Firstname Lastname | GEOG 279 | Assignment #".


| **Week** | **Assignment**                                   | **Due Date**  |
|----------|-------------------------------------------------|---------------|
| Week 2   | Assignment 1 (includes paper topic)[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1SaXpt9wymm00qbPZevf4sHnS0h4RNP-B?usp=sharing) | Thurs, Oct 14 |
| Week 4   | Assignment 2 [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1qe7KkR5VX4ByQURT8JEGJZQhRzSr5rdT?usp=sharing)                                     | Tues, Oct 28  |
| Week 6   | Assignment 3 [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/15X79Y4QTRdeXTVVapthpGOS8_dzFw3-j?usp=sharing)                                     | Tues, Nov 11  |
| Week 8   | Assignment 4 [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1sop7vZKRmg23y_QAqK9DGRbRelwLKkcB?usp=sharing)                                    | Thurs, Nov 25 |
| Week 10  | Final Paper Proposal                             | Mon, Dec 10   |
